title: Triage ticket
instruction: Read the support ticket, identify customer, product area, reported behavior, requested outcome, and classify severity using impact, urgency, affected users, revenue risk, and workaround availability.

title: Gather support context
instruction: Check mock customer history and MOCK_SUPPORT_API for plan, account status, recent tickets, known incidents, similar issues, incident matches, and troubleshooting guidance.

title: Prepare customer reply
instruction: Summarize the issue in 2-4 sentences without speculation, identify missing information, and draft a customer-facing reply with status, next step, and any safe workaround.

title: Create escalation handoff
instruction: Create the internal escalation note with reproduction details, evidence, severity, owner suggestion, recommended next team, logged next action, due time, and follow-up message.
